sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113797" key="xermasth/r" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χερμ-αστήρ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ῆρος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n113797.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">slinger,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">ῥινὸς χ.</foreign> the leather <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of a sling,</tr_> out of which the stone was thrown, <*>b.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0154.tlg001:172" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">172</biblScope> </bibl> (<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Antip.Sid.</author> </bibl>), cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
